verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You know my needs and all that's unspoken You hold the pieces of all that's been broken Even when a melody won't come Even when my words are not enough

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You will be my song You will be my praise You will be my voice when I'm lost for words to say You will be my strength You will lift me up You will be my portion and my everlasting love You will be my song

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Before I call I know You'll hear me When hope is gone still You are near me Even when the answer is delayed Even through the darkness I will say

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You will be my song You will be my praise You will be my voice when I'm lost for words to say You will be my strength You will lift me up You will be my portion and my everlasting love You will be my song

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Even when I feel like I'm alone I know You'll never leave me on my own

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You will be my song You will be my praise You will be my voice when I'm lost for words to say You will be my strength You will lift me up You will be my portion and my everlasting love You will be my song
